MINI MINUTES:

NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT BASHIR ALABSI'S Demurrer TO First Amended Complaint Of Khadija Lowrey IS OVERRULED. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action And For Sanctions, Motion To Transfer Action And P&A In Support Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JUDITH P. KNECHT, ESQ., (510)339-2140, FOR DEFEDANT/MOVING PARTY BASHIR M. ALABSI
MICHAEL S. KECK, ESQ., (415)861-2267, APPEARING SPECIALLY FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY BASHIR ALABSI
SAMER DANFOURA, ESQ., (415)970-8012, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, KHADIJA LOWREY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BASHIR M. ALABSI'S Motion To Transfer Action TO ALAMEDA COUNTY And For Sanctions IS DENIED. VENUE IN SAN FRANCISCO IS PROPER IN LIGHT OF DEFENDANT'S RESIDENCE AND THE PRESENCE IN SAN FRANCISCO OF REAL PROPERTY WHOSE OWNERSHIP IS DISPUTED. DEFENDANT PRESENTS NO EVIDENCE SUGGESTING ANY BASIS ON WHICH SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT A PROPER VENUE OR ON WHICH IT WOULD BE PROPER TO TRANSFER VENUE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF'S FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1095 PURSUANT TO CCP 396b(b). MR. DANFOURA'S ORAL REQUESTS TO INCREASE THE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS AND TIME LIMIT FOR PAYMENT IS DENIED BY THE COURT. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/PM)
